name: bigvgan_overnight
description: BigVGAN vocoder quality sweep. Axes: snake_alpha steps, all_params short run, GAFilter on/off, discriminator FM, phase loss weight. All use LoRA-distorted mels as input so vocoder learns to fix LoRA artifacts.

experiments.description: Snake alpha + GAFilter baseline. 3000 steps, same as first successful run but longer.
Snake alpha + GAFilter, 5000 steps. Test if longer training improves further.
Snake alpha only, no GAFilter. Isolate GAFilter contribution.
Snake alpha + GAFilter, no phase loss. Isolate phase loss contribution.
Snake alpha + GAFilter, phase weight 2.0. Stronger phase penalty.
Snake alpha + GAFilter, lower LR 5e-5. Test if slower converges better.
Snake alpha + GAFilter + discriminator feature matching. Perceptual loss should directly penalize harmonic smearing.
All params, 2000 steps, strong L2-SP (1e-2). Test if full param tuning with heavy anchor beats snake-only.
